acceptance_criteria: Status with image shows media_attachments array with full MediaAttachment objects; Status without image shows media_attachments=[] not null; posting with invalid media_id returns 422; posting with another account's media_id returns 422
description: Update the Status serialization layer to include media_attachments. When a post has associated media (via post_id FK in media table), include the full MediaAttachment objects in Status.media_attachments. The array must always be present (empty array if no media, never null). Validate that media_ids in POST /api/v1/statuses belong to the authed account and are not already attached to another post.
design: When creating post with media_ids: verify each media row belongs to authed account and post_id is null. On post creation: UPDATE media SET post_id=? WHERE id IN (?...). On Status read: SELECT media WHERE post_id=?.
title: Status serialization with media_attachments
